name: Devex Resources Limited
analysis: DEV's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.2500, stop A$0.1782, target A$0.2750 (0.35:1) — then trail it.
